_meta.doc: Surveillance -> Corruption. The System's help is free in the moment and ruinous in aggregate. Cumulative Surveillance (across a run) corrupts the Subject; at the collection threshold the System 'collects' you — the run ends and you are reclaimed (the bad ending). Tiers impose escalating penalties so leaning on the System is a real, mounting cost.

tiers.name: Watched
tiers.note: It logs your every move; you hesitate.

tiers.name: Flagged
tiers.note: It nudges your hand; you fight a half-second behind yourself.

tiers.name: Near-Claimed
tiers.note: It is deciding for you now. You can feel it choosing.
